scripts.dev:test:web: dotenv -e apps/web/.env.test -- npm --prefix apps/web run dev -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.dev:test:api: dotenv -e apps/api/.env.test -- npm --prefix apps/api run start:dev
scripts.db:test:create: /opt/homebrew/opt/postgresql@16/bin/psql -d postgres -tc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'wenshu_ai_test'" | grep -q 1 || /opt/homebrew/opt/postgresql@16/bin/createdb wenshu_ai_test
scripts.db:test:generate: dotenv -e apps/api/.env.test -- npm --prefix apps/api run prisma:generate
scripts.db:test:migrate: dotenv -e apps/api/.env.test -- npx prisma migrate deploy --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:test:setup: npm run db:test:create && npm run db:test:generate && npm run db:test:migrate
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:api
